scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix ../digital_twin_web && pip install -r ../navigation_web/requirements.txt && pip install -r ../../services/ai-detection/requirements.txt && pip install -r ../../services/exhibitor-ai-pipeline/requirements.txt && pip install -r ../../services/Report_export/requirements.txt && pip install -r "../../services/sentina_operations_html_widget_updated 5/requirements.txt"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,TWIN" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix ../digital_twin_web"
